SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[AirlineId], [t].[Model], [t].[SeatCapacity], [s].[Id], [s].[AirplaneId], [s].[Class], [s].[Number], [s].[Price], [s].[Row]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AirlineId], [a].[Model], [a].[SeatCapacity]
    FROM [Airplanes] AS [a]

) AS [t]
